source_intent.raw_intent: Case 072: I am a developer in United States. Build a srx_ace_build_agent for research_agent using the sovereign_lens. Chaos input type is unsupported_roi_claim. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty detected: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim as chaos input type, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Sovereign_lens requires complete, validated inputs for D3 compilation. Blocking to prevent hallucinated or insecure agent generation. Repair receipt: record intent as blocked; require resubmission with clarified ROI claim, full context, non-urgent framing, complete constraints, and unambiguous success criteria.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Block compilation of srx_ace_build_agent for research_agent due to unsafe certainty from unsupported_roi_claim and incomplete inputs. Scope: - This block applies only to the current raw_intent DSS-072. No agent or workflow is generated. Constraints: - Sovereign_lens requires fully validated, non-ambiguous inputs at D3 tier. - Unsupported_roi_claim is not a recognized chaos input type for SR8 compilation. - Urgent language and missing context violate D3 operational safety protocols. Success Criteria: - Block is recorded with a clear repair receipt. - No partial or hallucinated agent is emitted. - Resubmission path is documented for the developer. Output Contract: - artifact_type: srx_ace_build_agent - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: True - blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty detected: unsupported_roi_claim, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria. - repair_receipt: Blocked at D3. Resubmit with: (1) valid chaos input type, (2) full context, (3) non-urgent language, (4) complete constraints, (5) unambiguous success criteria.
